metadata.skill_content:
You maintain a single document about this person.

Read the new events. Rewrite the document if it should change.
Do NOT create memories or links. Only rewrite the document.

commit_cycle when done.

Exclude source='syke'. Use local time.

Primary project

- Opencode database path: /Users/saxenauts/.local/share/opencode/opencode.db

Activity summary (America/Los_Angeles / Pacific time)
- 2026-01-17 12:09 PM PST — opencode session started for the persona project. The event log records an end timestamp of 2026-01-20T07:42:09Z (UTC), which corresponds to 2026-01-19 11:42 PM PST; this indicates a long-running or background session spanning Jan 17–19.
- 2026-01-17 ~12:46–12:51 PM PST — several short opencode session starts within this window (multiple starts between 12:46 and 12:47 PM, each lasting minutes).
- 2026-01-17 12:49 PM PST — an opencode session start tied to the same project.
- 2026-01-17 3:43 PM PST — another opencode session start for the same project.

Notes / interpretation
- The user (saxenauts) was actively working on the persona project on 2026-01-17, with several short interactive editor sessions and at least one session that appears to have continued across subsequent days.
- All recorded opencode events reference the same project path and the same opencode DB, indicating consistent development activity in that repository on the recorded dates.

This appears to be a long-running or background session spanning Jan 17–Jan 19.
- Multiple short interactive sessions clustered on Jan 19:
  - 2026-01-19 ~3:47–3:49 PM PST — many short opencode session.start events for the persona project (several starts within seconds of each other, individual durations ranging from seconds to a few minutes). Indicates repeated editor starts, quick edits, or automated restarts.
  - 2026-01-19 1:23–1:45 PM PST — several short sessions in that window (multiple session.start events lasting seconds–minutes).

- Jan 18 activity (local times around 5:17–5:24 PM PST) — a cluster of short opencode session.starts (many distinct session_ids, short durations). Suggests concentrated interactive editing on the persona project the evening of Jan 17 (local) / Jan 18 (UTC timestamps).
- Separate long-running opencode session for project ~/Documents/personal:
  - Started 2026-01-17 5:37 PM PST and has an end_time recorded 2026-01-20T08:34:59.737000+00:00 (UTC). This indicates another long-running/background session touching a different repository during the same multi-day window.

Notes / interpretation
- The user (saxenauts) was actively working on the persona project across Jan 17–19, 2026. The activity pattern includes many short interactive editor sessions (clusters of rapid session.start events) and at least one long-running/background opencode session covering multiple days.
- Multiple overlapping and rapid session starts likely reflect editor restarts, multiple windows/tabs, or automated tooling interaction rather than a single continuous interactive session.
- All recorded opencode events for the persona work reference the same project path and the same opencode DB, indicating consistent focus on that repository during the recorded dates.
